MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Theresia Sandhu, Esq., 408-313-1174, Specialy appearing for Defendant, Rommell Remedio;
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Wells Fargo's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to submit from of proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312 by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
